## Frontmatter field reference

Fields the **nightly indexer computes and overwrites** — never hand-set
these when authoring or planning a note:
- `link_score` — backlink centrality, 0.0-1.0, recomputed every night from
  the current link graph
- `last_indexed` — ISO date of the indexer's last pass over this note

Fields **you set by hand** when authoring a note:
- `type` — note category (e.g. `technique-note`, `reference-note`)
- `series` — which named series this note belongs to, if any
- `tags` — free-form topic tags
- `aliases` — alternate titles/search terms
